doc: Voice patch for djfilter-demo.json (ADR-0032). One monophonic plucky saw voice: a held freq drives the oscillator, a held gate the plucky ADSR. NO djfilter here — the bipolar filter knob drives a single master djfilter on the summed mix (host post-mix), so the voice is just osc -> env VCA. interface: freq/gate in, audio/active out.

nodes.doc: Saw tone (rich harmonics for the master filter to chew).
Plucky ADSR envelope (linear CV), gated per step.
Shape the linear envelope CV into an exponential-style volume curve (x^2).
